_comment: Test Reconciliation history — append-only, committed. Each entry is a dated snapshot of per-block {total, disabled} produced by `node scripts/test-reconciliation.mjs --json`. The GitHub Pages build (scripts/build-test-reconciliation-page.mjs) renders these committed entries PLUS a freshly-computed 'live' entry so the page stays honest at deploy time. To add an entry: run `flox activate -- task test:recon -- --append` (or paste the --json `blocks` under a new dated key). Watch the disabled count fall over time. Do NOT edit past entries.

entries.note: Seed entry — first Test Reconciliation snapshot (test-stability restoration program, Area 1).

behavioral reconciliation #1 — re-enable moog984 (4×4 matrix mixer). It was NOT a no-upstream-source case: out1 = Σ in_i × m_i1 with all 16 cross-points defaulting to 0 (the attenumix/veils/videoMixer passive-mixer class). Opening column-1 cross-points via BEHAVIORAL_PARAMS lets the noise source on any of in1..in4 reach out1 — all 4 inputs are real-coverage passes (Δμrms≈0.18, ~18× the 0.01 floor). Verified 3× locally clean. behavioral disabled 64→63.
